title: Reverse Dissolution of Ineffective Hedging Relationships
toc_path: Closing Operations in Hedge Accounting for Exposures
Reverse Dissolution of Ineffective Hedging Relationships
body_html:
Reverse Dissolution of Ineffective Hedging Relationships

Use

This function reverses the dissolution of ineffective hedging relationships carried out using the function Retrospective Effectiveness Assessment: Dissolve Ineffective Hedging Relationships. It lists all the hedging relationships that correspond to your selection criteria. If you select a data record and choose Reverse , the system reverts to the version of the hedging relationship that existed before the dissolution.
